title: UIButton | Apple Developer Documentation
abstract: A control that executes your custom code in response to user interactions.
overview: UIButton is a class in UIKit. Use a button to send an action message to a target object when the user taps it.
rawMarkdown:
# UIButton | Apple Developer Documentation

Class# UIButton

A control that executes your custom code in response to user interactions.

## Overview

UIButton is a class in UIKit.
